name: Susie Essman
description: American stand-up comedian, actress, writer, television producer, and voice artist
abstract: Susan Essman (born May 31, 1955) is an American comedian, actress, producer, and writer. She is best known for her role as Susie Greene on Curb Your Enthusiasm (2000–2024), as the voice of Mittens in Bolt (2008), and as Bobbi Wexler on Broad City (2015-2019).

concerts.label: Cavalcade of Stars to Benefit the Shield Institute
Carolines 20th Anniversary Gala
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Catherine Russell
about_quotes.evidence: including like Joy Behar, Susie Essman, all these people who used to — we all had 15 minute slots and the singer would — usually they’d put the singer on after somebody famous
about_quotes.doc_title: Catherine Russell interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, October 26, 2018
